title: Fabulously Customized
description: This modpack is a fork of Fabulously Optimized, but I customized it.
body:
## Description:

This modpack is a fork of Fabulously Optimized, but I customized it. It is made for me to play survival with. Fabulously Customized works fully client side, meaning you can play on any vanilla server with it. It increases your performance, adds lots of nice little sounds and visual effects, and comes with some shaders and resource packs that can really upgrade your graphics, even while having good performance.

## Credits:

[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized 'Click here to see Fabulously Optimized')\
This modpack is a modified fork of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized 'Click here to see Fabulously Optimized')

All of the mod devs, shader devs, and resourcepack artists\
Modding Minecraft would not be possible without them!\
To see a full list of the projects included in this modpack, click on one of the available versions and scroll down to the dependencies list.

Me\
I made the modpack not crash after I made it crash
